\caption{$Q_{90} = Q_{45} \cup \Ccls(Q_{45})$: $\Ccls$-closure of the canonical ``Adjacent + 6 pads'' seed at pad-seed $42$. The first family member with $|\text{Tier B}|$ not divisible by $3$ (S178 obstruction).}
\label{fig:q90}
\end{figure}
